temporal_description: A medium shot captures a man in a dark suit and tie, wearing an earpiece, standing in a dimly lit control room. He has a serious, focused expression as he looks slightly off-camera. In the background, other people are seated at computer stations, and computer monitors display various data and graphics. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The audio opens with a low, tense, and atmospheric musical score, creating a mood of suspense and seriousness. The camera cuts to a close-up of a different man in a light-colored shirt, looking down with a concerned and somber expression. The background is dark and out of focus. The "风行网" watermark remains in the same position. A man speaks in a low, firm, and decisive voice, stating, "就这样" (Just like this). His tone is calm but carries a sense of finality and resignation, as if accepting an unpleasant but necessary outcome. The shot returns to the first man in the suit. The camera is now in a tighter close-up on his face, emphasizing his intense and determined gaze. The earpiece is still in place. The background is dark and indistinct. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing the man in the suit from a side profile. He continues to look forward with a stern expression. The earpiece is visible, and the background remains dark. The "风行网" watermark is in the upper left. The scene cuts to a medium shot of an older man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket. He is sitting at a desk in a dimly lit room, holding a phone receiver to his ear with a worried look on his face. The "风行网" watermark is visible. The shot is slightly shaky, suggesting a handheld camera. The tense music continues to play softly in the background, underscoring the gravity of the moment.
